'''vahupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kwassa|kwassa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kwassa|kwassa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vahupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væhipith|væhipith]] || [[word:væhipij|væhipij]] || [[word:væhipish|væhipish]] || [[word:væhipi|væhipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vahuhuputh|vahuhuputh]] || [[word:vahuhupuj|vahuhupuj]] || [[word:vahuhupush|vahuhupush]] || [[word:vahuhupu|vahuhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vahuputh|vahuputh]] || [[word:vahupuj|vahupuj]] || [[word:vahupush|vahupush]] || [[word:vahupu|vahupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vahufputh|vahufputh]] || [[word:vahufpuj|vahufpuj]] || [[word:vahufpush|vahufpush]] || [[word:vahufpuf|vahufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vahuputhu|vahuputhu]] || [[word:vahupuju|vahupuju]] || [[word:vahupushu|vahupushu]] || [[word:vahupuku|vahupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vahuputh|vahuputh]] || [[word:vahupuj|vahupuj]] || [[word:vahupush|vahupush]] || [[word:vahupu|vahupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vahuputhul|vahuputhul]] || [[word:vahupujul|vahupujul]] || [[word:vahupushul|vahupushul]] || [[word:vahupukul|vahupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vahuputhuthu|vahuputhuthu]] || [[word:vahupujuju|vahupujuju]] || [[word:vahupushushu|vahupushushu]] || [[word:vahupuku|vahupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vahuputhun|vahuputhun]] || [[word:vahupujun|vahupujun]] || [[word:vahupushun|vahupushun]] || [[word:vahupukun|vahupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vahuputhuoro|vahuputhuoro]] || [[word:vahupujuoro|vahupujuoro]] || [[word:vahupushuoro|vahupushuoro]] || [[word:vahupukuoro|vahupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
